final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, ssbid1000m, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE geom IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.sql: SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

2.sql: SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1;

3.sql: SELECT id, objid, ssbid1000m, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE geom IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons reduced to Kristiansand extent (will use bbox from step 1)

3.description: get 1km grid cells that intersect Kristiansand extent (will use bbox from step 1)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: count distinct 1km grid cells intersecting storm-flood polygons

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, ssbid1000m FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

execution_error: {"executed": false, "step": 4, "action": "spatial_join", "error": "execute_spatial_join_step failed: spatial_join input too large before GeoPandas execution: left step 3 has 478640 rows and right step 2 has 115453 rows (55260423920 possible pairs). Limit is 500000000 possible pairs. To fix: re-query the larger step with a spatial bounding-box filter — compute the bbox of the smaller result set and add ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(minx, miny, maxx, maxy, srid)) to that step's WHERE clause, then retry this spatial tool."}
